parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-4 loadFeedbackEngine parity — getLoadFeedbackAdjustment branch coverage. Three sessions each carry a bench-press 'too_heavy' and a squat 'too_light' feedback, so the recent-3 window for bench-press is all too_heavy (>=2 => 'conservative') and for squat is all too_light (>=2 => 'slightly_aggressive'); a no-match exerciseId yields the empty 'normal' default (no dominantFeedback). Probes pin each adjustment direction + its reasons + dominantFeedback. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: recent = collectLoadFeedback(history, id).slice(0,3); too_heavy>=2 => conservative, too_light>=2 => slightly_aggressive, none => normal default.
